name: search
description: Semantic search over the CURRENT PROJECT'S index (cross-project search is not supported). Embeds the query and ranks indexed entries by cosine similarity. Defaults to searching file summaries; can also search indexed conversations or commits, or all types combined. Output: optional `# index:` metadata lines (age + number of entries newer than last index) followed by `score<TAB>identifier` lines. For type=all, identifier is prefixed with the entry type. If the metadata line reports many stale entries OR the index is flagged STALE, AND the results don't answer the user's question, instruct the user to run `scratch index` to refresh the index.

query.description: Natural-language query (e.g. 'how does retry logic work', 'database schema', 'auth refactor').

type.description: Which entry type to search. 'file' = indexed source files (default). 'conversation' = past chat transcripts. 'commit' = git commit messages. 'all' = mixed; identifier is prefixed with the type for disambiguation.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 10.
